title: NoRotation
description: Disable random rotation for all naturally generated blocks
body:
# No Rotation This resource pack disables random rotation for all naturally generated blocks in Minecraft. It’s especially useful for Streamers that play servers like [DonutSMP](https://store.donutsmp.net/), so they don't leak their bases' coordinates (using maths)
![BeforeAndAfter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d44d4ed9b7d05acc78e34a8afbad6a78d7283f3.png) (You got to look closely to be able to notice the difference) The best part? This pack only modifies blockstates. This means it can be placed **on top of any other resource pack** without affecting textures.
